security.csp: default-src 'self' customprotocol: asset:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
